original text:
December , York City, five nominees Cinema Honors Heterodox Award were announced today, honoring films that actively blur line between narrative fiction first time Cinema history, films that nominated Cinema Eye's nonfiction film craft honors also nominated Heterodox Award.
nonfiction announced last month Brooklyn, These Sleepless Nights nominated Original Score Kate Plays Christine nominated Direction. Both films debuted  Sundance Film Festival, critics audiences have debated films' place line ever since.
other three nominees continue cinema that Heterodox award known for. Fits Neon Bull debuted  Venice Film Festival, Mountains Depart celebrated World Premiere Cannes that same year.
This marks seventh year Heterodox Award Cinema Eye. Previous winners award Matt Putty Hill (), Mike Mills' Beginners (), Cohen's Museum Hours (), Carlos Reygados's Post Tenebras (), Richard Boyhood () Jafar Panahi's Taxi ().
With this year's Heterodox nominees, this year's Cinema nominated films filmmakers have been revealed. recipient this year's Legacy Award will announced coming weeks.
finalists Heterodox Award were selected voting Cinema Honors Committee, made more than specialize nonfiction film. finalists were then viewed five nominees were selected second round committee, composed nonfiction second round included Scott Macaulay (Editor Chief, Filmmaker Magazine), Hadrian Belove (Executive Director, Cinefamily), Eric Hynes (Associate Curator Film, Museum Moving Image), Doug Jones (Executive Director, Images Cinema), Mads Mikkelsen (Programmer, CPH:DOX), Nuxoll (Program Director, Rooftop Films), Rachael Rakes (Film Critic, Brooklyn Rails) Alison Willmore (Film Critic, Buzzfeed).
Honors Ceremony Cinema Week, multi-day, multi-city that best work nonfiction film through screenings events. final four days Cinema Week take place York City, where series events brought together many year's most filmmakers. This year's dates January -, with awards presented Museum Moving Image Queens January .
Nonfiction film th Annual Cinema Honors were announced last month Alamo Drafthouse Brooklyn. full list nominees found Cinema Honors website:
